name: Benihana Hibachi Steak
recipeIngredient: 20 ounces Sirloin steak, boneless (5 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 4 teaspoons of soybean oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Slice mushrooms into thick pieces.
3. Season with salt and pepper if desired.
4. Add the mushroom slices to the hot skillet and cook until browned and tender.
5. Place the steaks in the skillet and cook for about 1-2 minutes per side, depending on the desired level of doneness (rare).
6. Serve hot with Benihana Magic Mustard Sauce if desired.
